name: Chocolate Fudge (Rice)
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine butter and the sides of a heavy 2-quart saucepan.
2. In the saucepan, combine sugar, evaporated milk, chocolate, salt, and corn syrup.
3. Cook over medium heat until the chocolate melts and sugar dissolves. Do not stir.
4. Cook to soft ball stage (236°F). Remove immediately from heat.
5. Add 2 tablespoons butter without stirring.
6. Cool to lukewarm (110°F).
7. Add vanilla and pour into a bowl.
8. Attach bowl and beater, turn to speed 2, and beat for 8 minutes or until fudge stiffens and loses its gloss.
9. Quickly change to stir speed and add nuts.
10. Spread in a buttered 9x9-inch pan.
11. Cool at room temperature.
12. Cut when firm.
YIELD: 25 1 inch squares.
